title: Air Wick Aerosol-Free Automatic Air Freshener Spray Refill, Eucalyptus & Freesia, Pack 1 x 228ml, 24x7 Active Fresh Odour Neutraliser, Lasts Up to 70 Days, Air freshener For Home
features: Aerosol-free automatic air freshener spray refill from Air Wick
Eucalyptus fragrance with 24x7 active fresh odour neutralizer
Lasts up to 70 days for continuous freshness
description: Product Description Air Wick 24/7 Active Fresh is Air Wick's first aerosol-free and best ever automatic air freshener. Our latest odour neutraliser is infused with natural essential oils for long lasting fragrance to banish tough odours for up to 70 days. Tackle dog, bathroom and kitchen smells with your choice of 3x intensity settings, plus an instant action boost button. Ensure you place your 24/7 Active Fresh above 6ft for an optimum performance and room fill. Air Wick is a proud partner of WWK UK, working to restore UK wildflower habitats. Air Wick is raising £400,000 per year for WWF-UK for wildflowers conservation projects (WWF-UK Trading Ltd pays all taxable profits to WWF-UK charity registered in England & Wales 1081247, Scotland SC039593) Ingredients ALCOHOL
